projectDescription: Advanced modding platform for games running on DICE's Frostbite game engine
keyFeatures: Frostbite Engine Support - Comprehensive tooling for DICE's Frostbite engine across 25+ games
Frosty Editor - Advanced visual editor for modifying game assets with real-time preview
Mod Manager - User-friendly application for installing and managing game modifications
Plugin Architecture - Extensible system supporting custom asset editors and tools
Asset System - Complete EBX, RES, and chunk resource handling with type reflection
Multi-Game Support - Battlefield, FIFA, Need for Speed, Dragon Age, Mass Effect, Star Wars and more
Command-Line Tools - Batch processing and automation support via FrostyCmd
Visual Asset Editing - Built-in editors for textures, meshes, sounds, localization and more
publicApiSurface: FrostySdk.AssetManager - Central asset management and loading system
FrostySdk.ResourceManager - Game resource access and manipulation
FrostySdk.FileSystem - Low-level file system interaction with Frostbite archives
FrostySdk.TypeLibrary - Runtime type information and reflection for game objects
Frosty.Core.PluginManager - Plugin loading, initialization and lifecycle management
Frosty.Core.Plugin - Base plugin class with metadata attributes
Frosty.Core.AssetDefinition - Define custom asset types and editors
Frosty.Core.FrostyProject - Project file management and mod authoring
FrostyModSupport.FrostyModExecutor - Mod installation and execution engine
EbxAssetEntry - Entry point for EBX asset manipulation
ResAssetEntry - Entry point for resource asset manipulation
ChunkAssetEntry - Entry point for chunk asset manipulation
PointerRef - Reference type for asset pointer relationships
ResourceRef - Reference type for resource dependencies
Plugin Attributes - PluginDisplayName, PluginAuthor, PluginVersion for metadata
Asset Editor Extensions - Custom editor registration and UI integration
Profile System - Game-specific configuration and support via SDK profiles
Compression Utilities - Decompression and obfuscation handling per game
